# DevFlow AI

> AI-powered GitHub repository scanner that maps architecture, generates onboarding guides, and lets engineers chat with any codebase.

DevFlow AI takes a public GitHub URL and returns an opinionated engineering report: tech stack, architecture map, health & complexity scores, security warnings, and AI-generated suggestions. It also produces a structured onboarding guide for new engineers and a chat interface grounded in the scanned repo.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, demo, pricing.
- [Sign in](/login): Email/password authentication.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a new DevFlow account.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Past scans, stats, and quick actions.
- [Scanner](/scanner): Submit a GitHub URL for analysis.
- [Scan detail](/scan/$id): Overview, onboarding guide, and repo chat for a specific scan.
